summary: Iteration 83: Complete testing of ManoProtect 3 operational security modules - CRA Operator Dashboard, Client Security Dashboard, and CRM auto-provisioning. ALL 16 BACKEND TESTS PASSED. ALL FRONTEND UI COMPONENTS VERIFIED.
seed_data_creation: Created test alarms (INTRUSION, PANIC, SABOTAGE) during backend testing - all resolved as cleanup. Demo installation exists: 030a0734-d116-4802-9052-5be831830c0e (Carlos Martinez, Madrid)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 83 verified all 3 NEW operational security modules. (1) CRA Operator Dashboard (/cra-operador): Stats panel shows instalaciones/dispositivos/pendientes/en_curso/eventos_hoy/resueltos_hoy. Tabs: Alarmas/Instalaciones/Protocolos. Alarm list shows severity-colored cards with click-to-open detail modal. Alarm modal has 6 action buttons: Video-verificar, Llamar titular, Avisar Policia, Despachar Acuda, Falsa alarma, Resuelto. Protocol modal shows step-by-step procedures for intrusion/panic/sabotage/fire. (2) Client Security Dashboard (/mi-seguridad): Requires auth via AuthContext. Shows arm status panel with 3 modes (Total/Parcial/Desarmado). Tabs: Panel/Camaras/Eventos/Usuarios. Panel tab shows device count and recent events. Add user button opens modal for owner role. (3) Backend: CRA routes support CRUD for alarms/installations/devices, protocols endpoint returns 4 protocols with steps, provision-from-crm creates installation + client access. Client App routes support arm/disarm, events history, cameras (MOCKED streaming URLs), users management. Test installation: 030a0734-d116-4802-9052-5be831830c0e.

backend_cra_module.GET /api/cra/dashboard: PASS - Returns stats: total_installations, pending_alarms, total_devices, in_progress, today_events, resolved_today, recent_alarms
backend_cra_module.GET /api/cra/alarms: PASS - Returns enriched alarm list with client_name, address, city from installation
backend_cra_module.POST /api/cra/alarms: PASS - Creates alarm with installation_id, event_type, zone, severity, description
backend_cra_module.POST /api/cra/alarms/{id}/action: PASS - Logs action and updates status (verify_video, call_client, call_police, dispatch_acuda, false_alarm, resolved)
backend_cra_module.PATCH /api/cra/alarms/{id}/assign: PASS - Assigns operator to pending alarm, changes status to in_progress
backend_cra_module.GET /api/cra/protocols: PASS - Returns 4 protocols (intrusion, panic, sabotage, fire) with numbered steps
backend_cra_module.GET /api/cra/installations: PASS - Returns installations list with client_name, address, armed_status
backend_cra_module.POST /api/cra/provision-from-crm: PASS - Creates installation + client_app_access, returns installation_id + access_code

backend_client_app_module.GET /api/client-app/my-installations: PASS - Returns user's installations with user_role, device_count (requires x-user-email header)
backend_client_app_module.POST /api/client-app/installation/{id}/a: PASS - Client arm/disarm with access validation
backend_client_app_module.GET /api/client-app/installation/{id}/ca: PASS - Returns cameras with MOCKED stream_url/snapshot_url

frontend_cra_dashboard.stats_panel: PASS - Shows 6 stat cards (instalaciones, dispositivos, pendientes, en_curso, eventos_hoy, resueltos_hoy)
frontend_cra_dashboard.tabs: PASS - tab-alarms, tab-installations, tab-protocols all clickable
frontend_cra_dashboard.alarms_list: PASS - Shows severity-colored cards with event_type, status badge, client info
frontend_cra_dashboard.alarm_detail_modal: PASS - Opens on alarm click, shows status/severity badges, description, action log
frontend_cra_dashboard.alarm_action_buttons: PASS - All 6 buttons present: action-verify-video, action-call-client, action-call-police, action-dispatch-acuda, action-false-alarm, action-resolved
frontend_cra_dashboard.installations_list: PASS - Shows installation cards with armed_status indicator
frontend_cra_dashboard.protocols_list: PASS - Shows 4 protocol cards, clickable to open modal with numbered steps

frontend_client_dashboard.arm_status_panel: PASS - Shows current armed status with color, description, address
frontend_client_dashboard.control_panel: PASS - Shows device count, recent events
frontend_client_dashboard.cameras_panel: PASS - Shows cameras or 'Sin camaras configuradas' message
frontend_client_dashboard.users_panel: PASS - Shows users list with add-user-btn for owner role
frontend_client_dashboard.add_user_modal: PASS - Opens with form fields (name, email, role)
